semantic_properties.name: Categories_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Stores product category definitions and metadata, serving as a lookup table for classifying products in the inventory system.

semantic_properties.name: CustomerCustomerDemo_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Associative table linking customer entities to demographic profiles, facilitating many-to-many relationships between customers and customer types.

semantic_properties.name: CustomerDemographics_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Stores descriptive characteristics and demographic profiles associated with customer types. This table defines the categories of customers and their corresponding descriptions, serving as a lookup table for customer classification.

semantic_properties.name: Customers_semantic
semantic_properties.description: A table storing detailed information about customers, including contact details, demographics, and shipping addresses.

semantic_properties.name: Employees_semantic
semantic_properties.description: A table containing detailed information about the company's employees, including personal details, contact information, job titles, and organizational hierarchy.

semantic_properties.name: EmployeeTerritories_semantic
semantic_properties.description: A junction table linking employees to their assigned sales territories, enabling many-to-many relationships between staff and geographic regions.

semantic_properties.name: Order Details_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Stores individual line items for each order, linking products to orders with specific pricing, quantities, and discounts. This table captures the details of items purchased in a single order transaction.

semantic_properties.name: Orders_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Stores details about customer orders including dates, shipping information, assigned employees, and shipping carriers.

semantic_properties.name: Products_semantic
semantic_properties.description: A master table storing details for all products in the inventory, linking to categories and suppliers to manage product information, pricing, and stock levels.

semantic_properties.name: Regions_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Stores distinct geographical region definitions used to categorize territories.

semantic_properties.name: Shippers_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Stores information about shipping companies used for delivering orders.

semantic_properties.name: Suppliers_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Stores detailed information about product suppliers, including company details, contact persons, and geographical data.

semantic_properties.name: Territories_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Contains geographic territory definitions including descriptions and their associated regions for sales or distribution tracking.

semantic_properties.name: CategoryID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique integer identifier for each product category, acting as the primary key for the Categories table.

semantic_properties.name: CategoryName_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Textual name representing the category group, such as Seafood, Dairy Products, or Beverages.

semantic_properties.name: Description_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Detailed text explaining the contents or characteristics of the product category.

semantic_properties.name: Picture_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Binary large object storing the visual representation or icon associated with a specific product category.

semantic_properties.name: CustomerID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique identifier referencing a specific customer record from the Customers table.

semantic_properties.name: CustomerTypeID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique identifier referencing a specific demographic type from the CustomerDemographics table.

semantic_properties.name: CustomerTypeID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique identifier for a specific customer type or demographic category. Acts as the primary key for the CustomerDemographics table and is referenced by the CustomerCustomerDemo table to link customers to their demographic groups.

semantic_properties.name: CustomerDesc_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Descriptive text providing details about the specific customer type or demographic segment. This field offers context on the characteristics or attributes defining the customer category.

semantic_properties.name: CustomerID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: A unique identifier for each customer, serving as the primary key.

semantic_properties.name: CompanyName_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The name of the customer's business or organization.

semantic_properties.name: ContactName_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The name of the primary contact person for the customer.

semantic_properties.name: ContactTitle_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The job title or role of the contact person within the company.

semantic_properties.name: Address_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The street address of the customer's location.

semantic_properties.name: City_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The city where the customer is located.

semantic_properties.name: Region_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The region or state/province where the customer is located.

semantic_properties.name: PostalCode_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The postal or zip code associated with the customer's address.

semantic_properties.name: Country_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The country where the customer is located.

semantic_properties.name: Phone_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The telephone number of the customer.

semantic_properties.name: Fax_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The fax number of the customer.

semantic_properties.name: EmployeeID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique identifier for each employee, serving as the primary key for the Employees table and referenced by other tables for relationships.

semantic_properties.name: LastName_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The surname or family name of the employee.

semantic_properties.name: FirstName_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The given name or first name of the employee.

semantic_properties.name: Title_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The job title or position held by the employee within the organization.

semantic_properties.name: TitleOfCourtesy_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The honorific or courtesy title used when addressing the employee (e.g., Mr., Ms., Mrs., Dr.).

semantic_properties.name: BirthDate_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The date of birth of the employee.

semantic_properties.name: HireDate_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The date when the employee was hired by the company.

semantic_properties.name: Address_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The home street address of the employee.

semantic_properties.name: City_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The city where the employee resides.

semantic_properties.name: Region_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The geographical region or state where the employee is located.

semantic_properties.name: PostalCode_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The postal or zip code associated with the employee's home address.

semantic_properties.name: Country_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The country where the employee resides.

semantic_properties.name: HomePhone_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The home telephone number of the employee.

semantic_properties.name: Extension_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The internal telephone extension number for the employee.

semantic_properties.name: Photo_semantic
semantic_properties.description: A binary large object (BLOB) containing the employee's photograph.

semantic_properties.name: Notes_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Additional text notes or biographical details about the employee.

semantic_properties.name: ReportsTo_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The EmployeeID of the manager to whom this employee reports, indicating the organizational reporting line.

semantic_properties.name: PhotoPath_semantic
semantic_properties.description: A text string containing the URL or file path to the employee's photograph.

semantic_properties.name: EmployeeID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique identifier for the employee assigned to a specific territory.

semantic_properties.name: TerritoryID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique identifier for the sales territory or geographic region associated with an employee.

semantic_properties.name: OrderID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique identifier for the order that this line item belongs to. Links the detail record back to the main Orders table.

semantic_properties.name: ProductID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique identifier for the product included in this order detail. Links the detail record back to the Products table.

semantic_properties.name: UnitPrice_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The price of a single unit of the product at the time of the order. This price is recorded statically to preserve historical accuracy of the transaction.

semantic_properties.name: Quantity_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The number of units of the specific product ordered in this line item.

semantic_properties.name: Discount_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The discount percentage applied to this specific line item. A value of 0 indicates no discount, while higher values indicate greater discounts up to the maximum allowed.

semantic_properties.name: OrderID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The unique identifier for each sales order.

semantic_properties.name: CustomerID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The unique identifier linking the order to a specific customer.

semantic_properties.name: EmployeeID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The unique identifier linking the order to the employee who processed it.

semantic_properties.name: OrderDate_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

semantic_properties.name: RequiredDate_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The date by which the customer expects the order to be delivered.

semantic_properties.name: ShippedDate_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The date and time when the order was actually shipped.

semantic_properties.name: ShipVia_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The identifier for the shipping carrier or company used to deliver the order.

semantic_properties.name: Freight_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The cost of freight or shipping charged for the order.

semantic_properties.name: ShipName_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The name of the customer or company to whom the order is being shipped.

semantic_properties.name: ShipAddress_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The street address where the order is to be delivered.

semantic_properties.name: ShipCity_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The city where the order is to be delivered.

semantic_properties.name: ShipRegion_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The region, state, or province where the order is to be delivered.

semantic_properties.name: ShipPostalCode_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The postal or zip code for the shipping destination.

semantic_properties.name: ShipCountry_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The country where the order is to be delivered.

semantic_properties.name: ProductID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The unique identifier for each product in the system.

semantic_properties.name: ProductName_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The name or title of the product.

semantic_properties.name: SupplierID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The identifier linking the product to its supplier in the Suppliers table.

semantic_properties.name: CategoryID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The identifier linking the product to its category in the Categories table.

semantic_properties.name: QuantityPerUnit_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The packaging unit quantity or size description for the product.

semantic_properties.name: UnitPrice_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The selling price for a single unit of the product.

semantic_properties.name: UnitsInStock_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The current number of units of the product available in inventory.

semantic_properties.name: UnitsOnOrder_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The number of units of the product that are currently ordered from the supplier but not yet received.

semantic_properties.name: ReorderLevel_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The minimum quantity of the product in stock that triggers a reorder notification.

semantic_properties.name: Discontinued_semantic
semantic_properties.description: A flag indicating whether the product is discontinued (active or inactive status).

semantic_properties.name: RegionID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique integer identifier for each geographical region.

semantic_properties.name: RegionDescription_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Textual name or label describing the geographical region.

semantic_properties.name: ShipperID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique identifier for each shipping company.

semantic_properties.name: CompanyName_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Name of the shipping company.

semantic_properties.name: Phone_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Contact phone number for the shipping company.

semantic_properties.name: SupplierID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The unique identifier for each supplier.

semantic_properties.name: CompanyName_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The legal or trading name of the supplier company.

semantic_properties.name: ContactName_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The name of the primary contact person at the supplier.

semantic_properties.name: ContactTitle_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The job title or role of the contact person within the supplier company.

semantic_properties.name: Address_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The street address of the supplier's location.

semantic_properties.name: City_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The city where the supplier is located.

semantic_properties.name: Region_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The region or state/province of the supplier's location.

semantic_properties.name: PostalCode_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The postal or zip code for the supplier's address.

semantic_properties.name: Country_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The country where the supplier is based.

semantic_properties.name: Phone_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The primary telephone number for the supplier.

semantic_properties.name: Fax_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The fax number associated with the supplier's business contact.

semantic_properties.name: HomePage_semantic
semantic_properties.description: The website URL or homepage link for the supplier.

semantic_properties.name: TerritoryID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Unique identifier for each sales territory, typically formatted as a postal code.

semantic_properties.name: TerritoryDescription_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Descriptive name or label for the territory, often representing a city or specific area.

semantic_properties.name: RegionID_semantic
semantic_properties.description: Foreign key linking the territory to its broader geographic region.
